channel.title: Video tutorials on the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity
channel.description:
Hi there 👋
Just wanted to share a few video tutorials about the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity that might help you get started:
* Video tutorial in **English** on how to setup and customize the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity by @imranhsayed: https://youtu.be/i1LaEDv0PNk.
* Video tutorial in **Spanish** on how to setup the theme by @Dominicode: https://youtu.be/xvOiya9ODg4.
These are great, thanks you guys! 🙌

item.title: Video tutorials on the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: Dominicode
item.source: Video tutorials on the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity

item.title: Video tutorials on the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity
item.dc:creator: imranhsayed
item.description:
Your welcome @Reyes.
Thank you @Dominicode for creating the video in Spanish.

Read full topic

item.title: Video tutorials on the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity

item.description:
Hi there

Just wanted to share a few video tutorials about the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity that might help you get started:

  • Video tutorial in English on how to setup and customize the Twenty Nineteen theme for Frontity by @imranhsayed: https://youtu.be/i1LaEDv0PNk.

  • Video tutorial in Spanish on how to setup the theme by @Dominicode: https://youtu.be/xvOiya9ODg4.

These are great, thanks you guys!
